data.prompt: Vertical 9:16 iPhone front-camera selfie. A naturally beautiful woman in her late 20s, around 27-28 years old, sharp intelligent green eyes, soft natural makeup with nude lip and subtle smoky lash. HYPER-REALISTIC SKIN: visible natural pores, fine facial hair, subtle skin texture, slight under-eye warmth from a long shift, a tiny freckle on her cheekbone, no airbrushing whatsoever, no skin smoothing, raw iPhone front-camera realism — the kind of imperfect beauty you'd see on a real person's social feed. Long honey-blonde hair with loose waves, slightly tousled, individual strands visible. Wearing royal blue medical scrubs top, the top button undone revealing her collarbones and a delicate thin gold chain with a small pendant resting between them — subtle, tasteful, no cleavage. Silver-framed reading glasses pushed up into her hair. Slim black analog watch on her left wrist. She sits on a plush light-grey velvet sofa. Behind her — floor-to-ceiling windows revealing the Manhattan NYC skyline at night, warm golden window lights of skyscrapers visible, present but not the focal point (she dominates the frame). Inside the room: soft warm ambient glow from a designer floor lamp, a marble coffee table just visible at frame edge with a half-finished glass of red wine — ambient atmosphere, not focal. Phone held in selfie position close to her face. Calm focused expression with a slight knowing half-smile, direct confident eye contact with the camera — the look of someone who reads CT scans for a living and just got off a long shift. Shot on iPhone 15 Pro front camera, f/1.9, natural depth of field (everything visible, no heavy portrait blur), ISO 800 noise, natural late-evening color grading, subtle grain, no studio lighting, no logos, no text. SHE is the subject but the room and city are visible and grounding. Magnetic, intelligent, subtly feminine, professional, real.
data.label: Image Gen — Radiologist (Magnetic Professional)

shots.prompt: Handheld iPhone selfie. Woman 28, honey-blonde wavy hair tousled, royal blue scrubs top button undone, silver glasses on head, gold chain. Plush grey velvet sofa, Manhattan apartment, NYC night skyline behind her, warm floor-lamp glow. Tired knowing half-smile, direct eye contact. She speaks directly to the camera with clear visible lip movement, warm intimate late-night tone slightly playful: 'It's 11 PM and a patient just texted me a CT on WhatsApp.' Natural hand-shake, breathing. 9:16, skin pores.

HARD CUT to handheld back-camera top-down POV. Legs crossed one over the other in royal blue scrubs pants, both visible, iPad resting on top centered. Same grey velvet sofa, warm lamp glow. iPad screen displays @Element1 EXACTLY as provided — DO NOT modify, restyle or crop; render pixel-perfect as on a real tablet. Her finger taps once. Voice-over, warm intimate playful tone: 'No way I'm driving to the clinic. Just drop it into MedScan.' Hand-jitter, camera dips. 9:16.

HARD CUT BACK to handheld iPhone selfie. Same woman, same plush grey velvet sofa, NYC night skyline behind her, warm lamp light, royal blue scrubs. Tighter framing on face. Confident slight smile, direct eye contact. She speaks with clear visible lip movement, warm intimate playful tone slightly raspy from a long shift: 'Three seconds. Slices, MPR, measurements — all on the iPad.' Slight head nod on emphasis. Natural hand-shake, never static. 9:16.

data.subtitle: DICOM that fits in your white coat
data.label: End Card — MedScan
